content.json:
# JumpCloud Security Overview
---
Real-time visibility into device logins, software changes, and managed device and user inventory from JumpCloud MDM.

content.query:
union
  (JumpCloud_Events_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where log_type_s == 'directory_event' | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = 'Total Events'),
  (JumpCloud_Events_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where log_type_s == 'directory_event' and event_type_s == 'login_attempt' | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = 'Login Attempts'),
  (JumpCloud_Events_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where log_type_s == 'directory_event' and event_type_s == 'login_attempt' and success_b == false | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = 'Failed Logins'),
  (JumpCloud_Events_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where log_type_s == 'directory_event' and di_service_s == 'software' | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = 'Software Changes')
| project Metric, Value

JumpCloud_Events_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where log_type_s == 'directory_event'
| summarize Events = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), di_service_s
| render timechart
content.title: Directory Events by Service (Hourly)

content.query:
JumpCloud_Events_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where log_type_s == 'directory_event' and event_type_s == 'login_attempt'
| summarize count() by tostring(success_b)
| project Result = iff(success_b == 'true', 'Success', 'Failed'), Count = count_
content.title: Login Results

content.query:
JumpCloud_Events_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where log_type_s == 'directory_event' and event_type_s == 'login_attempt'
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    Device = system_displayName_s,
    User = initiated_by_username_s,
    Success = success_b,
    Country = geoip_country_code_s,
    City = geoip_city_s,
    IP = client_ip_s
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100
content.title: Recent Login Attempts

content.query:
JumpCloud_Events_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where log_type_s == 'directory_event' and di_service_s == 'software'
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    EventType = event_type_s,
    Device = system_displayName_s,
    Application = application_name_s,
    Version = application_version_s
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100
content.title: Recent Software Changes

content.query:
JumpCloud_Events_CL
| where log_type_s == 'system'
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by hostname_s
| project
    Device = displayName_s,
    Hostname = hostname_s,
    OS = os_s,
    Active = active_b,
    LastSeen = lastContact_t
| order by LastSeen desc
content.title: Managed Devices

content.query:
JumpCloud_Events_CL
| where log_type_s == 'logged_in_user'
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by username_s, host_s
| project
    User = username_s,
    Device = host_s,
    LastSeen = TimeGenerated
| order by LastSeen desc
content.title: Currently Logged In Users
